unified_frame_statement: Maria shares her spiritual awakening with Guide Sophia, showing how connecting to inner wisdom helped her overcome spiritual emptiness and discover profound life purpose.

state_alpha.internal_monologue: "Something is missing but I don't know what."
state_alpha.sensory_anchor: The hollow feeling in her chest during success moments

the_abyss.realization: "I was searching outside for what was always within."

the_spark.insight_quote: "She said 'You are the light you've been seeking.' I felt it." (23:40)

state_omega.action: Daily connection practice and purpose-aligned work
state_omega.result: Purpose clarity from 2/10 to 9/10 in 6 months

sensory_anchors: The restless searching energy of before
The warm glow during the awakening meditation
The groundedness she carries in every step now
